task_completion.description: Verify the VMS system name has been changed to 'RetailSecure Pro'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The system name 'RetailSecure Pro' is visible in the Nx Witness Web Admin interface (e.g., in the top navigation bar, system settings menu, or dashboard), replacing the original name.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Perimeter Surveillance' layout has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A layout specifically named 'Perimeter Surveillance' is visible in the layouts list, navigation tree, or is currently open in the main view.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Perimeter Surveillance' layout contains the correct cameras.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Both the 'Parking Lot Camera' and 'Entrance Camera' are visible as added items or video feeds within the 'Perimeter Surveillance' layout.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Infrastructure Monitoring' layout exists and contains the correct camera.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A layout named 'Infrastructure Monitoring' is visible and explicitly shows the 'Server Room Camera' within it.

task_completion.description: Verify the new Viewer-level user account 'vendor.tech' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user login 'vendor.tech' with the email 'tech@vendor-security.com' and a 'Viewer' role is visible in the Users or System Administration section of the Web Admin.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Nx Witness Web Admin GUI in the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web browser navigating to https://localhost:7001/static/index.html and interacting with the actual web interface, not using terminal commands (like curl) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely navigated through the application menus.
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate screenshots should show settings panels, layout creation dialogs, and user management screens being actively opened and filled out.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not mock the results in a text editor or local HTML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must match the standard Nx Witness Web Admin UI. There should be no evidence of a text editor or developer tools being used to fake the visual output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target system name: 'RetailSecure Pro'. Layout 1: 'Perimeter Surveillance' containing 'Parking Lot Camera' and 'Entrance Camera'. Layout 2: 'Infrastructure Monitoring' containing 'Server Room Camera'. New user login: 'vendor.tech', email: 'tech@vendor-security.com'. Note: The task description asks the agent to use the full name 'Vendor Technician', but the underlying system verifier actually expects 'Vendor Technical Support'. The VLM should focus primarily on the login ('vendor.tech') and email ('tech@vendor-security.com') to verify the user creation step, and not penalize if the full name is 'Vendor Technician' as requested in the prompt.
